channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Grosse confusion autour de la date de lancement de la Steam Machine
item.description: Sortira, sortira pas ? La fenêtre de lancement de la Steam Machine et des autres produits annoncés par Valve en novembre dernier a été au cœur d'un joli pataquès durant le week-end. Au bout du compte, rien ne change… sauf qu'on a eu très peur.

item.title: La Nasa remplace discrètement l’étage clé de sa fusée pour Artemis III
item.description: Alors que la Nasa a annoncé une refonte du programme lunaire Artemis, la fusée SLS (Space Launch System) va changer d'étage supérieur. C'est désormais un Centaur V qui va servir à propulser la mission Artemis III.

item.title: This Canon laser printer offers super-fast printing, scanning, and copying - ideal for small businesses, it’s now under $330
item.description: Canon imageCLASS MF465dw laser printer delivers fast printing, scanning and copying and with 40% off it's currently under $330.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra : voici ce que font les pixels quand vous activez l’affichage confidentiel
item.description: Grâce à un objectif macro, nous pouvons voir comment agissent les pixels de l'écran du Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra quand on active l'affichage confidentiel.

item.title: 3 of the biggest new Netflix shows to stream in March 2026
item.description: Netflix has seriously impressed me this month, here are three huge shows you won't want to miss.

item.title: ‘Daredevil: Born Again’ Showrunner Teases Jessica Jones’ Return
item.description: Plus, new rumors about casting the 'X-Files' reboot.

item.title: M4 iPad Air Review: The ‘Better’ iPad Is Now Really That Good
item.description: Small upgrades and an improved iPadOS change everything.

item.title: Apple iPhone 17e Review: MagSafe Makes a Difference
item.description: A bump in storage and the addition of MagSafe make Apple's cheapest iPhone a better value proposition than its predecessor.

item.title: Feeld Was a Dating App for the Freaks. Now Some People Call It ‘Normie Hell’
item.description: The app that catered to unconventional kinks is gaining steam among daters with vanilla preferences—and some aren’t happy about it.

item.title: Panic’s gaming ambitions hinge on the weird and whimsical
item.description: A game about an annoying goose with a button dedicated entirely to honking isn't the obvious recipe for a hit. But doing the less-obvious thing has become the norm for Panic's gaming efforts, which have included everything from the Playdate handheld to the surprisingly popular Untitled Goose Game. So when it came time for developer […]

item.title: The iPhone 17E is good, but you probably shouldn’t buy it
item.description: The iPhone 17E is a better value than the 16E was when it arrived, but that should matter to basically nobody. The main thing to know about the 17E is that the iPhone 17 exists, it costs $200 more - or maybe more significantly, an extra $9 per month on a two-year payment plan not […]

item.title: Apple iPad Air M4 review: a little bit faster now
item.description: The newest iPad Air is a chip bump iPad - maybe the chip-bump-iest iPad Air yet. Inside this new machine are, in fact, three upgraded chips compared to last year's model: an M4 processor, a C1X cellular modem, and an N1 chip that brings the Air Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, and Thread support. That is […]

item.title: The 2027 Chevy Bolt is the McRib of the automotive world
item.description: TechCrunch drove the 2027 Chevy Bolt and found that incremental improvements build on a solid basic recipe to deliver an affordable EV.

item.title: I tested the iPhone 17e, and it's an even better budget iPhone thanks to more storage, faster performance, and a smarter camera
item.description: With the A19 chip, double the starting storage, and the addition of MagSafe, it makes the best-value iPhone even more compelling.

item.title: I tested the iPad Air with M4, and Apple just stretched the value proposition even further
item.description: Apple's 13-inch iPad Air doesn't change much in terms of looks, but the M4 chip under the hood certainly speeds things up.

item.title: iPad Air M4 review: Apple's best overall tablet, with a few caveats
item.description: Perhaps one of the most surprising things about the Apple Silicon era is how quickly Apple now updates its products. Take the iPad Air, for example. It’s been less than two years since the company released the M2-powered iPad Air in 11- and 13-inch sizes. We’re already on our third iPad Air iteration, one with the M4 inside. That’s the same chip that was inside the iPad Pro that was unveiled alongside that M2-powered Air in 2024. (The Pro was updated with an M5 last fall.) Just as I said a year ago when Apple unveiled the iPad Air M3, this latest model doesn’t fundamentally change the formula....

item.title: iPhone 17e review: The economical choice
item.description: By introducing the iPhone 17e just a year after the iPhone 16e, Apple is closing some gaps. Before, the company would only roll out a new entry-level iPhone every few years, with the iPhone 5c (2013), iPhone XR (2018) and iPhone SE (2016, 2020, 2022) all having two to four years between their releases. But Apple is getting into an annual groove now, and having renamed the device to integrate better with the rest of the iPhone lineup, Apple is making a clear statement: It cares about the midrange now. With the current state of global economics, Apple’s focus on lower cost devices like the iPho...

item.title: Microsoft says ungoverned AI agents could become corporate 'double agents.' Its fix costs $99 a month.
item.description: Microsoft today announced the general availability of Agent 365 and Microsoft 365 Enterprise 7, two products designed to bring security and governance to the rapidly growing population of AI agents operating inside the world's largest organizations. Both become available on May 1st, alongside Wave 3 of Microsoft 365 Copilot, which expands the company's agentic AI capabilities and adds model diversity from both OpenAI and Anthropic.Agent 365, priced at $15 per user per month, serves as what Microsoft calls the "control plane for agents" — a centralized system for IT, security, and business team...

item.title: Prise en main | Apple iPhone 17e : le printemps peut commencer
item.description: Une nouvelle habitude printanière se dessine dans le marché nord-américain du sans-fil : celle des téléphones bon marché. Après Google il y a deux semaines, Apple vient de lancer sa propre proposition d’entrée de gamme, un iPhone 17e qui coûte moitié moins cher qu’un iPhone 17, et dont la performance n’est pas si réduite que ça par sa fiche technique limitée....

item.title: Flipkart moves its headquarters back to India ahead of IPO
item.description: Flipkart's headquarters shift comes as the Walmart-backed e-commerce giant reaches about $30 billion in GMV.

item.title: We've got our first full and official look at the OnePlus 15T — and it's stretching the definition of 'small screen king'
item.description: OnePlus has revealed the design of its upcoming OnePlus 15T phone, and it's going to be launching this month.

item.title: I use OneOdio headphones every day, and the budget version cans are now just £35 — run!
item.description: These are multi-purpose over-ear headphones, and can be yours for just £35 in the Amazon sales.

item.title: How Live Nation allegedly terrorized the concert industry
item.description: SeatGeek was close to a deal that would bring its ticketing business to the next level. The company was in negotiations with the Dallas Cowboys, aiming to take over first-party sales at its stadium. But there was one sticking point: "the concert issue." The team feared that if it dropped SeatGeek's rival Ticketmaster, Ticketmaster's parent […]

item.title: Microsoft warns ClickFix attacks targeting Windows Terminal to trick users into running malware
item.description: Windows Run is no longer the primary vessel for these attacks as hackers find viable alternatives.

item.title: Windows 11 is finally getting an easy way to access dark mode — and a fix for those 'flashbangs' that still plague File Explorer
item.description: Annoying white flashes are still hanging around in Windows 11 for some users, but hopefully not for much longer.

item.title: Ventes flash : Amazon démarre la chasse aux bonnes affaires avant l’heure (Fire TV Stick, Kindle…)
item.description: Ce mardi 10 mars 2026 signe le début des ventes flash d’Amazon, mais le géant américain propose déjà de belles réductions sur ses produits phares, Kindle, Fire TV Stick, Ring Cam…

item.title: The 10 best sleep apps and gadgets for a better night's sleep in 2026
item.description: Tech has a bad (and deserved) reputation as a sleep killer. Blue light, incessant scrolling and information onslaught conspire to keep us on edge and exiled from dreamland. But a few gadgets and apps out there may actually help us sleep. We’ve tried many such products over the years and have gathered the ones that actually did some good in this list. But first, take the arguably most important step towards good sleep: Use the sleep schedule on your phone (Android, iPhone). Once you’ve done that, check out the best sleep gadgets below and prepare to shuffle off to the land of nod. Best sleep a...

item.title: The best air purifier for 2026
item.description: As houses and apartments get more energy efficient, they also get more airtight, limiting air exchange with the outside world. That’s partly why indoor air is often far more polluted than outdoor air. Synthetic building materials, cleaning products, pet dander, cooking emissions and smoke all conspire to muck up what we breathe in. In our tests, the best way to get the green light from our air quality monitors was opening the windows. But bad weather, wildfires and high pollen-count days mean you can’t always do that. Air purifiers are your next best option. Their combination of specialized fi...

item.title: ‘Gravity Falls’ Is *Finally* Getting an Art Book
item.description: If you've been holding out hope all this time for a 'Gravity Falls' art book, Alex Hirsch and Rob Renzetti have something for you.

item.title: OpenAI s’allie au Pentagone : sa cheffe de la robotique démissionne en dénonçant un manque de sécurité
item.description: Caitlin Kalinowski, responsable de la robotique d’OpenAI, évoque l’absence de « cadre » dans l’accord qui lie la firme américaine au Département de la guerre de l’administration Trump.

item.title: What is the release date for Virgin River season 7 on Netflix?
item.description: After that shocking season 6 finale, I need resolutions this very second. But when does Virgin River season 7 arrive on Netflix?

item.title: « Le marché va s’effondrer » : le patron de Mercedes tire la sonnette d’alarme sur la voiture électrique en Europe mais oublie la Chine
item.description: Ola Källenius, le PDG de Mercedes-Benz, tire la sonnette d’alarme à Bruxelles. Selon lui, les récentes propositions de l'Union européenne sur les émissions de CO2 risquent de déstabiliser profondément le marché de l'automobile. Une vision défensive de l'industrie qui occulte pourtant le véritable danger : le retard accumulé face à la Chine.

item.title: Qualcomm's new Arduino Ventuno Q is an AI-focused computer designed for robotics
item.description: Qualcomm, which purchased microcontroller board manufacturer Arduino last year, just announced a new single-board computer that marries AI with robotics. Called the Arduino Ventuno Q, it uses Qualcomm's Dragonwing IQ8 processor along with a dedicated STM32H5 low-latency microcontroller (MCU). "Ventuno Q is engineered specifically for systems that move, manipulate and respond to the physical world with precision and reliability," the company wrote on the product page. The Ventuno Q is more sophisticated (and expensive) than Arduinio's usual AIO boards, thanks to the Dragonwing IQ8 processor th...

item.title: Best Sonos Speakers (2026): Soundbars, Headphones, Dolby Atmos, and More
item.description: From smart speakert so soundbars, Sonos makes the best streaming speakers you can buy. These are my personal favorites.

item.title: Dairy Queen announces Free Cone Day for 2026 — how to claim your free cone
item.description: On March 19, celebrate Free Cone Day 2026 at Dairy Queen. Score a free vanilla soft-serve cone at participating Dairy Queen locations.

item.title: Score the best 11-inch iPad Air preorder deal at Amazon — save $40 on this new M4 iPad
item.description: As of March 9, Amazon has knocked $40 off 11-inch iPad Air (M4, 128GB, WiFi) pre-orders. This has dropped their price from $599 to $559.

item.title: Windows 11 : cette mise à jour est crucial pour empêcher votre PC de planter en juin
item.description: Un composant essentiel de votre PC pourrait expirer en juin 2026. Une mise à jour Windows est là pour l'empêcher.

item.title: Google gives CEO Sundar Pichai a mega pay rise, as Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang also gets a tidy bonus
item.description: Google and Nvidia are rewarding their CEOs after company success and strong financial performance.

item.title: The Magic: The Gathering Marvels Spider-Man Gift Bundle is at its lowest-ever price on Amazon — save vs. TCGplayer
item.description: Amazon has the MTG Marvel's Spider-Man Gift Bundle for $59.99, undercutting TCGplayer's current price by a wide margin.
